packages.name: Private Group
packages.description: Exclusive private experience for your group

items.name: Sarah & James
items.text: Absolutely the highlight of our trip to Valencia! The chef was incredibly warm, the food was divine, and the rooftop views were breathtaking. Worth every penny.

items.name: Marco Rossi
items.text: As an Italian, I know good food. This experience exceeded my expectations. The market tour was fascinating and cooking over open fire was unforgettable.

items.name: Emily Chen
items.text: I've done cooking classes worldwide — this is hands down the best. intimate setting, amazing instructor, and the paella was incredible. Already planning to come back!

items.question: What is included in the experience?
items.answer: Every experience includes a guided visit to Mercado Central, all ingredients, cooking instruction, a full meal with wine, and a recipe booklet to take home.

items.question: Do I need any cooking experience?
items.answer: Not at all! Our experiences are designed for all skill levels. Our chefs guide you through every step in a fun, relaxed environment.

items.question: What languages are the classes offered in?
items.answer: All classes are offered in English and Spanish. Private groups can request other languages with advance notice.

items.question: Can you accommodate dietary restrictions?
items.answer: Yes! We offer vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and other dietary options. Please let us know when booking.

items.question: What is the cancellation policy?
items.answer: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before the experience. Cancellations within 48 hours are eligible for a 50% refund or rescheduling.

items.question: How many people are in each group?
items.answer: Our standard groups have a maximum of 12 people to ensure a personal, hands-on experience. Private groups can be arranged for larger parties.

hero.title: Authentic Paella Experience in Valencia
hero.subtitle: A hands-on culinary journey through Valencia's most iconic dish

intro.title: More Than a Cooking Class
intro.subtitle: An immersive cultural experience
paragraphs: Valencia is the birthplace of paella — and there's no better way to connect with this city's soul than by cooking its most iconic dish over an open fire.
From hand-picking the freshest ingredients at local markets to mastering the art of socarrat, this is an experience that engages all your senses.
Whether you choose our urban art-gallery setting or a countryside villa, you'll leave with unforgettable memories, new skills, and a full heart.

bloom.title: Bloom Gallery — Ruzafa
bloom.subtitle: Urban Art Meets Valencian Fire
bloom.description: Nestled in the vibrant Ruzafa neighborhood, Bloom Gallery is a creative space where art and gastronomy collide. Cook authentic paella surrounded by local artwork in an intimate, urban setting perfect for culture lovers and foodies alike.

magnolia.title: Casa Magnolia — Alzira
magnolia.subtitle: Countryside Villa & Wood-Fire Cooking
magnolia.description: Escape the city to Casa Magnolia, a charming traditional Valencian villa surrounded by orange groves. Experience authentic wood-fire paella cooking in a lush garden setting — the ultimate countryside culinary retreat.
features: Available most days of the week

items.title: Cooking Class
items.description: Learn the secrets of authentic paella — from sofrito to socarrat — over traditional wood fire.

items.title: Feast & Enjoy
items.description: Sit down to enjoy the paella you've made, paired with local wines. Share stories and savor every bite.

description.title: About This Experience
paragraphs: Step into the heart of Valencian culture with our signature paella experience. This isn't just a cooking class — it's an immersive journey through the flavors, traditions, and soul of Spain's most famous dish.

Your adventure begins at the legendary Mercado Central, where you'll wander through centuries-old stalls bursting with fresh seafood, vibrant vegetables, and aromatic spices. Your expert chef guides you as you select the perfect ingredients.

Back at our stunning venue, you'll master the art of paella over traditional wood fire. Learn the techniques passed down through generations — the perfect sofrito, the ideal rice-to-broth ratio, and the coveted socarrat.
